proposals.summary: Provide a read-only control view for source rights, permitted use, retention, lineage, freshness, latency, cost, and expiry before any data-dependent phase is approved.
proposals.title: Data entitlement and provenance control view

proposals.summary: Preserve immutable reasons for selected, rejected, expired, and abstained research candidates so Operator review can compare actual decisions with counterfactual alternatives without post-hoc rewriting.
proposals.title: Counterfactual research decision journal

proposals.summary: Research an explainable confidence budget that detects correlated evidence and prevents macro, sector, instrument, and microstructure signals from being counted repeatedly as independent confirmation.
proposals.title: Correlated evidence confidence budget

proposals.summary: Register the five-clock and three-chain institutional event architecture for A-share and BTC research, including point-in-time official calendars, overlapping event states, expectation gaps, reaction quality, earnings phases, futures expiry, equity supply shocks, policy windows, rates and FX transmission, institutional crowding, holiday liquidity, data freshness, causal challenge, and a governed factor lifecycle. Preserve the named research candidates EARNINGS_SURPRISE, EVENT_REACTION_QUALITY, EXPIRY_BASIS_ROLL_STRESS, EQUITY_SUPPLY_PRESSURE, FX_TRANSMISSION_SENSITIVITY, INSTITUTIONAL_CROWDING, WINDOW_DRESSING_PRESSURE, HOLIDAY_LIQUIDITY_STRESS, POLICY_NOVELTY_ALIGNMENT, and CAPITAL_TRANSMISSION_PRESSURE. All thresholds and weight changes remain deterministic research hypotheses requiring evidence and Operator approval; AI remains advisory.
proposals.title: Institutional calendar and causal market intelligence

proposals.summary: Provide a deterministic read-only decision gate that compares bounded first-MVP market candidates against registered target, success, unit-economics, commercial, legal, license, data-rights, rollback, and stop evidence without selecting a market or authorizing a product phase.
proposals.title: First MVP market and product readiness decision gate

proposals.summary: Define a deterministic registered-local A-share first-MVP research baseline for isolated target and horizon candidates, point-in-time data-field requirements, evaluation obligations, and explicit success, failure, and stop evidence requirements. Preserve unresolved thresholds, provider rights, economics, legal review, and market selection as evidence gaps. This baseline supplies auditable input to FCF-FCP-0005 without selecting a vendor, authorizing realtime data, closing product gaps, or starting a product phase.
proposals.title: A-share MVP target data and acceptance baseline

proposals.summary: Register and validate an exact Operator-provided RQData official A-share daily evaluation demo without redistributing provider bytes. Normalize repeated UTF-8 BOM markers in memory, validate bounded daily-bar schema and quality invariants, produce deterministic normalized and replay fingerprints, and expose missing coverage and entitlement facts through a read-only Operator packet. This phase does not select a provider, approve commercial or retention rights, authorize realtime data, satisfy product readiness, close referenced gaps, or start a product phase.
proposals.title: A-share RQData demo artifact intake and deterministic replay acceptance

proposals.summary: Add an ASCII-source Chinese presentation adapter for the existing read-only browser console and a provider-neutral registered local CSV intake preview. Reuse existing console and artifact authorities, preserve GET and HEAD only, expose deterministic digest, schema, bounded quality, rights, and missing-coverage facts, and provide explicit Operator guidance without browser upload, automatic registration, source mutation, provider selection, realtime access, product readiness, or execution authority.
proposals.title: Chinese browser console and provider-neutral local data intake preview

proposals.summary: Compose the frozen local event ingress, multi-clock semantics, and localized browser console into a provider-neutral market-data adapter readiness layer. Register local tick, minute-bar, and order-book mappings; normalize exact registered replay observations; expose deterministic heartbeat, latency, sequence, coverage, and degradation diagnostics; and keep external activation blocked without selecting RQData or any provider, using network access, storing credentials, approving rights, claiming realtime or product readiness, closing gaps, or enabling execution.
proposals.title: Provider-neutral market data adapter readiness and diagnostics
